---
title: "Example analysis note — {{PROJECT_NAME}}"
format: html
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
targets::tar_load(example_summary)

n_species <- nrow(example_summary)
n_obs <- sum(example_summary$n_obs)
```

This note demonstrates the **Data Reference Policy**: every reported number is
pulled from the `targets` pipeline via `tar_load()` and interpolated inline —
never hard-coded in the prose.

We analyzed `r scales::comma(n_obs)` observations across `r n_species`
species.

```{r table}
#| echo: false
example_summary
```

Replace this note with your own analysis (see `SETUP.md`, step 8).

## Session information

Recording the environment in the rendered output makes the note
self-documenting: the R version, platform, and package versions that produced
these numbers travel with the artefact.

```{r session-info}
#| echo: false
sessioninfo::session_info()
```
